The '''husk lizard''' was a diminutive reptilian creature native to [[Herego]], frequently kept as pets by wealthy humanoids in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Squalris]] trading magnate [[Sanglui]] was known to have kept an unusually tame husk lizard named [[Farnak]], who would perch on his master's arm and yip beseechingly whenever food was near.

{{Creature-stub}}
